name: Knockwurst in Beer/Wine with Kraut
recipeIngredient: 1 cup beer, OR 1 cup white wine instead of beer
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large skillet.
2. Cover tightly and simmer over low heat for 15-20 minutes.
3. Serve with mashed potatoes. Alternatively, prepare in a crockpot (6 hours cooking time) and serve the same way. Ham hocks can be added if desired; remove most of the fat first.
